name: PRECIGEN, INC.
business: Precigen, Inc. is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in precision medicines for immuno-oncology, autoimmune disorders, and infectious diseases. Its only FDA-approved product is Papzimeos, a non-replicating adenoviral vector-based immunotherapy for adults with recurrent respiratory papillomatosis (RRP). The company also has a clinical pipeline including PRGN-2009 and UltraCAR-T programs, and generates service revenue from its Exemplar subsidiary providing genetically engineered miniature swine models.

exposures.sentence: Papzimeos (zopapogene imadenovec-drba, PRGN-2012) is a non-replicating adenoviral vector-based immunotherapy designed to express a fusion antigen comprising selected regions of HPV types 6 and 11 proteins the root cause of RRP.

catalysts.event: Submitted MAA to EMA for zopapogene imadenovec-drba for adults with RRP
catalysts.sentence: We submitted a Marketing Authorization Application (MAA) for zopapogene imadenovec-drba for the treatment of adults with RRP to the European Medicines Agency (EMA) in November 2025.
In August 2025, the FDA granted full approval to our product, Papzimeos (zopapogene imadenovec-drba, PRGN-2012), for the treatment of adults with recurrent respiratory papillomatosis (RRP).

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 27,000 adults in the United States living with RRP
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that there are approximately 27,000 adults patients in the United States living with RRP.
